Home.metaDescription: Discreet practice: sensitive mandates, leadership under pressure, role clarity in the age of AI.
Home.heroEyebrow: Transforming organizations in the age of AI
Home.heroSearchLabel: Search for a mandate or profile
Home.heroSubtext:
Your main problem is not technology. It is the organization.
And we are ready to discuss it with you.
In full confidentiality.
Home.positioningLine1:
Your main problem is not technology.
It is the organization.
Home.positioningLine2:
And we are ready to discuss it with you.
In full confidentiality.
Home.positioningInsight1: Many companies think they have an AI problem. They actually have an organizational problem. Roughly 30% of the value usually sits in tools. 70% in the organization.
Home.positioningInsight2: When an organization talks only about tools, it is often avoiding a harder conversation.
Home.positioningInsight3: We intervene when leaders understand the issue is no longer the tool. That is usually when, in often sensitive contexts, a mandate begins to address AI pressure.
Home.positioningInsight3Bullet3: identify profiles able to hold the transformation,
Home.cinematicMandateHeadline:
The role already exists.
Not its name yet.
Home.cinematicMandateSubheadline: Critical transformations are never purely technical. They are organizational, political, and human.
Home.cinematicMandateCardBody: We support organizations facing critical transformations in identifying leaders capable of carrying real change — before the organization drifts.
Home.servicesSectionTitle: XTEN SERVICES · ALL SECTORS · FRANCE EUROPE ASIA
Home.service01Body: Reading the real situation: where power, pace, and responsibility diverge from public narratives about AI.
Home.service02Body: Framed search: the mandate is written before the list of names.
Home.service03Body: A tight space for the top — trade-offs, blind spots, tempo.
Home.service04Body: Framing and vigilance at board level: AI and transformation stakes, trade-offs — without substituting for operational leadership.
